title: alisma stellatum
intro: Alisma stellatum, also known as starflower or Chinese water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma stellatum include reducing edema, treating urinary tract infections, and improving kidney function. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
